subject: fix(icons): favicon type/sizes, manifest id, stale build commands
body:
- Add type="image/png" and sizes="48x48" to favicon link for proper
  browser handling of non-ICO favicons
- Add "id": "/" to manifest.webmanifest for stable PWA identity across
  URL changes (prevents browsers treating the app as separate installs)
- Add pnpm generate-icons to SESSION_NOTES.md build commands (was
  already in CLAUDE.md but SESSION_NOTES.md copy was stale)

Tags: icons, meta, docs
Complexity: 1
Urgency: 1
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: app-icons
Semver: patch
